overall.description: GTA V gameplay footage featuring a female character exploring a barricaded urban area near the Miami Tower skyscraper during golden hour. The character walks through a narrow passage between construction barriers as a white van passes by, with the camera following in third-person perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza entrance with construction barriers

events.description: text overlay 'MIAMI TOWER' fades from the screen

agents.ego_description: character stands briefly then begins walking forward to explore the barricaded area

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with horizontal striping dominating the background
tall brown concrete construction barriers with weathered texture
tall brown concrete construction barriers creating a corridor
small structure with slanted transparent roof and graffiti on walls
modern glass building with green reflective facade visible in distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a text overlay reading 'MIAMI TOWER' as the character stands in an urban plaza surrounded by construction barriers. The Miami Tower skyscraper looms in the background while an abandoned kiosk sits to the left. The text fades and the character begins walking forward to explore the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: barricaded street with construction barriers on both sides

events.description: character turns left and continues walking toward the narrow passage
white van drives from right to left across the path in front of character

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily forward, navigating around the barriers while approaching the narrow passage

notable_agents.action: white van driving quickly from right to left past the character

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open barricaded area, passing the abandoned kiosk and turning left toward a narrow passage. A white van suddenly drives past from right to left, crossing the character's path. The Miami Tower grows larger in the frame as the character approaches the entrance to the narrow corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between high construction barriers leading to skyscraper

events.description: character enters the narrow corridor between tall construction barriers

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily down the narrow passage between high barriers, approaching the Miami Tower base

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed passage flanked by high construction barriers on both sides. Walking steadily forward, the Miami Tower looms increasingly large as the character approaches its base. The corridor creates a constrained perspective with the skyscraper filling the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an urban plaza that gradually tightens into a constrained corridor beneath a towering skyscraper. It begins with the character standing in an open area surrounded by construction barriers and an abandoned kiosk, with the Miami Tower looming in the distance. As the character begins to walk forward, the scene shifts toward a narrow passage while a white van suddenly drives across the path from right to left. The camera then follows the character into an enclosed corridor flanked by high barriers, causing the perspective to shrink as the Miami Tower grows increasingly large in the frame. Finally, the view becomes dominated by the massive base of the skyscraper as the character advances steadily through the restricted passage.
